description: Schema for multi-source capital expenditure extraction and reconciliation. Segments use numbered placeholders [1]–[4] because Intel restructured its reportable segments between 2022 and 2023 (CCG/DCG/NEX/IFS in 2022 → Intel Products / Intel Foundry in 2023). Segment names are resolved at runtime.

fields.name: capex_gross
fields.description: Gross additions to property, plant and equipment from the investing activities section of the cash flow statement. Intel labels this 'Additions to property, plant and equipment'. USD millions.

fields.name: finance_lease_additions
fields.description: PP&E additions obtained through finance leases. Disclosed in supplemental cash flow information or footnotes. USD millions.

fields.name: capex_total_gross
fields.description: Total gross capital additions: capex_gross plus finance_lease_additions. This is the broadest capex measure inclusive of all PP&E additions.

fields.name: partner_contributions
fields.description: Capital offsets received from manufacturing partners under Intel's SCIP (Semiconductor Co-Investment Program) or Smart Capital arrangements. Extract as a positive number representing the magnitude of the offset. USD millions.
fields.fallback_rule: May appear as 'Partner contributions received' or 'SCIP contributions' in operating or financing activities.

fields.name: capex_net
fields.description: Net capex after subtracting partner contributions. Intel may present this as 'Net capital spending' in supplemental schedules or IR documents.

fields.name: depreciation_amortization
fields.description: Total depreciation and amortization of property, plant and equipment. From cash flow or income statement. USD millions. Included for capex-to-DA ratio analysis.

fields.name: capex_seg_[1]
fields.description: Capital expenditures for segment [1] as disclosed in the segment information footnote. Segment [1] is typically Intel's largest reportable segment by revenue.
fields.fallback_rule: Look in 'Segment information' or 'Segment operating results' note. Intel may label this 'Additions to property, plant and equipment by segment' or 'Segment capital expenditures'.

fields.name: capex_seg_[2]
fields.description: Capital expenditures for segment [2] as disclosed in the segment information footnote.

fields.name: capex_seg_[3]
fields.description: Capital expenditures for segment [3] as disclosed in the segment information footnote.

fields.name: capex_seg_[4]
fields.description: Capital expenditures for segment [4] as disclosed in the segment information footnote.

fields.name: capex_seg_other
fields.description: Capital expenditures allocated to 'All Other', corporate, or unallocated categories in the segment footnote. USD millions.
fields.fallback_rule: May appear as 'Corporate and other', 'Eliminations', or 'Unallocated'.

fields.name: capex_seg_reported_total
fields.description: Total segment capital expenditures as reported in the segment footnote (the footer/subtotal row of the segment capex table). Used to cross-check against capex_gross from the cash flow statement.

fields.name: footnote_adjustment_desc
fields.description: Text description of any footnote-level adjustment, reclassification, restatement, or exclusion that affects the comparability of capex figures. Examples: 'Excludes $200M acquired PP&E', 'Finance lease reclassified from prior period'.

fields.name: footnote_adjustment_amount
fields.description: Monetary value of the footnote adjustment in USD millions. Positive = addition to reported capex, negative = reduction. Set to __not_found__ if no discrete adjustment is mentioned.

fields.name: reporting_units
fields.description: Unit scale stated on the face of the source document (e.g. 'millions', 'billions'). Used to verify normalization to USD millions.
fields.fallback_rule: Check document header, table footnotes, or the statement title. Intel 10-Ks and supplements typically report in millions.

fields.name: reporting_currency
fields.description: Currency of the source document (e.g. 'USD'). Intel reports exclusively in USD.

fields.name: capex_guidance_gross
fields.description: Intel management's full-year gross capex guidance figure (guidance documents and IR presentations). May be expressed as a range midpoint. USD millions.
fields.fallback_rule: May appear as 'Capital expenditures outlook', 'Capex guidance', or in an 'Outlook' table.

fields.name: capex_guidance_net
fields.description: Intel management's full-year net capex guidance after partner contributions / SCIP offsets. USD millions.

fields.name: capex_guidance_note
fields.description: Qualitative context from the guidance document: assumptions, year, basis (gross vs net), partner program details, or management commentary.
